mapper.sql: SELECT s.datasource_id AS id, s.user_id AS userId, s.source_name AS name, s.source_type AS type, s.config AS config, u.user_name AS userName, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM dashboard_datasource s LEFT JOIN dashboard_user u ON u.user_id = s.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_datasource (user_id, source_name, source_type, config) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{config})
